waffles-with-milk-caramel-sauce-argiro.name: Waffles With Milk Caramel Sauce

ingredients.item: 2 cups of flour for all uses (skinned)
2 cups of flour for all uses (skinned)

instructions: In a small pot heat the milk and butter until the butter melts (in low heat) without boiling.
In bowl, add the solid ingredients for waffles with milk caramel, flour, sugar, yeast, and mix with a spoon.
Beat eggs with salt and vanilla lightly.
After the butter melts in the milk, add 5 minutes to warm and add it to the flour bowl.
Add the beaten eggs and with a spoon or wire, mix them well to homogenize the porridge.
Cover it with membrane and leave it for at least 30 minutes to activate the yeast and show bubbles on the surface.
The longer we let the mixture stand, the prettier the waffles will become.
Turn on the waffle box, warm up.
Add a spoon of the mixture (depending on the size of the waffle box if small, the device will add less amount of porridge to avoid running on the sides).
Let the waffle bake and brown, become crispy and biscuits.
Add the black sugar and butter to a small pot over high heat, stirring with a spoon to melt.
Remove from heat and add the cream.
Add to the heat and let it bottle for 4 ́-5', something and something blisters look on the surface.
Let it cool before serving.
Place the waffle on a plate, add a ball of ice cream and pour with the caramel sauce.

If we make many waffles and they stay, after they are cooked and cool well, we put them one in a food bag in the freezer. At any time we can heat them in the toaster (freezing as they are) or in the oven, crisp. The waffle mixture can be left covered in the refrigerator for 2 days.

watermelon-hibiscus-smoothie-recipe-come.name: Watermelon-hibiscus Smoothie Recipe
watermelon-hibiscus-smoothie-recipe-come.original_name: Receta de batido de sandía y jamaica

ingredients.item: 600 g of watermelon in cubes (without seed)

instructions: Pon en una olla las tres tazas de agua y la flor de jamaica seca. Cocina hasta que hierva.
Una vez haya hervido, apaga y deja reposar por 10 minutos para que la jamaica suelte todo su extracto.
Pasado ese tiempo, cuela y reserva el zumo.
Add ham juice into a blender next to watermelon cubes, ice, lemon juice and honey.
It clears perfectly to a smooth and cold blend.
Serves in cups or cups and decorates with a watermelon cube or mint leaves.
Enjoy!

wet-brine-for-turkey.name: Wet Brine For Turkey

ingredients.prep: or 1 cup Morton kosher salt or 2/3 cup fine table or sea salt

instructions: In a heavy large stockpot, combine the salt and water, and stir to dissolve.
Place the turkey inside 1 heavy-duty brining bag or a double layer of oven-roasting bags and place inside a large roasting pan or extra-large bowl to guard against leaks or spills.
Carefully pour the brine into the brining bag then squeeze as much air as possible out of the bag, and use a twist tie or rubber band to seal the bag closed.
Arrange the pan or bowl in the refrigerator, preferably near the bottom, and let brine at least 8 (and up to 18) hours.
For best results, turn the turkey every 6 to 8 hours, so it brines evenly.
After at least 8 (and up to 18) hours, remove the turkey from the brine, draining off any excess.
If you'd like, give the turkey a quick rinse under cool water.
Dry the turkey thoroughly then let it sit for an hour or so at room temperature before roasting according to your favorite recipe.

white-bean-vegan-chili.name: White Bean Vegan Chili
instructions: Sauté onion, peppers, and garlic in oil until softened.
Add spices and toast them for a minute. Then, add all other ingredients.
Bring to boil, then simmer, covered, for ½ hour.
Salt to taste.
Garnish with avocado or cilantro if desired. Serve.

white-chocolate-and-apricot-cheesecake-t.name: White Chocolate And Apricot Cheesecake
white-chocolate-and-apricot-cheesecake-t.original_name: Cheesecake de chocolate branco e alperces

ingredients.item: Raspas de chocolate branco para decorar

instructions: Foil on the bottom in a removable 20 cm diameter with vegetable paper, leaving the paper surplus out of shape. Grind the cookies well and mix the melted butter. Lay the mixture inside the shape, spread and press with the back of a spoon, so as to stay a smooth and uniform layer. Take the shape to the fridge and let it harden.

Break the chocolate into pieces, melt them into a sea bath and mix the cream cheese. On the other hand, beat the cream until it is firm and add it to the previous preparation. Drain the gelatin in cold water for 5 minutes. Drain it, dissolve it in the hot water and add to the cream, slowly and always stirring.

Wash the apricots, cut 3 into cubes and wrap them in the previous cream. Lay it in shape, over the cookie base, and take it to the fridge until solidify well. Cut the remaining apricots into gomes and book them to decorate.

Dispose of the cheesecake, discard the paper carefully and put it on a plate. Decorate the dessert with the apricot buds and burn them slightly common torch. Take it back to the fridge or freezer to cool down. Add some white chocolate shavings and serve very cold.

white-chocolate-cream-cheese-fruit-tart.name: White Chocolate-cream Cheese Fruit Tart
instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Grease a 12-inch tart pan.
Beat butter and confectioners' sugar together in a bowl using an electric mixer until light and fluffy. Mix in flour until mixture is crumbly. Press into the prepared tart pan.
Bake crust until lightly browned, 25 to 30 minutes. Cool completely.

Beat melted and cooled white chocolate and heavy cream together in a bowl until smooth. Beat in cream cheese until thoroughly combined. Spread over cooled crust. Chill in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.

Combine 1/2 cup water and white sugar in a saucepan; bring to a boil. Mix remaining 1/2 cup water and cornstarch together in a bowl until cornstarch dissolves; add to sugar mixture. Cook and stir until mixture thickens and becomes clear, about 5 minutes. Stir in corn syrup; return to a boil. Remove glaze from heat; cool for 10 minutes.
Arrange strawberries, blueberries, and raspberries over cream cheese layer; brush with glaze. Chill in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour before serving; store in the refrigerator.

white-mocha-syrup.name: White Mocha Syrup
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the sweetened condensed milk, whole milk, vanilla, and sugar. Bring to a simmer over medium-high heat and stir until sugar has dissolved.
Add the white chocolate chips and stir until melted. Stir in the instant coffee until dissolved. Remove the pot from the heat and let the syrup cool completely.
Transfer the syrup to an airtight container and store in the refrigerator for up to 1 month.
Enjoy!

whole-wheat-chocolate-coffee-cake.name: Whole Wheat Chocolate-coffee Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease a 9-inch springform pan.
Whisk whole wheat flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, baking powder, cinnamon, cardamom, and salt together in a medium bowl.

Whisk brewed coffee and espresso powder together in a large bowl. Add Greek yogurt, applesauce, maple syrup, eggs, and vanilla extract; whish until thoroughly combined and no lumps remain. Stir in 1/2 of the dry ingredients and mix until just combined. Repeat with remaining dry ingredients. Fold in chocolate chips and walnuts. Pour batter into the prepared pan and place the pan onto a baking sheet.

Place both pans in the preheated oven and bake until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out with a few moist crumbs, 50 to 60 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 30 minutes. Gently run a table knife around the edges of the pan to loosen. Remove the sides of the pan and allow cake to cool completely, 15 to 30 minutes more.
Dust with powdered sugar before serving.

whole-wheat-stuffing-with-pancetta-chest.name: Whole Wheat Stuffing With Pancetta, Chestnuts, And Parmesan

ingredients.prep: cut (with crust) into 1/2- to 3/4-inch cubes (about 10 cups)

ingredients.item: - to 7.41-ounce jar whole steamed chestnuts or vacuum-packed roasted chestnuts

instructions: Position rack in center of oven and preheat to 191°C. Toss bread cubes and 2 tablespoons oil in large bowl. Spread in single layer on large rimmed baking sheet. Sprinkle with salt and freshly ground black pepper. Bake until bread cubes are golden and slightly crunchy, stirring occasionally, about 15 minutes. Cool slightly, then return bread cubes to same large bowl.

Sauté pancetta in heavy large skillet over medium heat until crisp, adding oil if dry, about 6 minutes. Tilting skillet to allow pan drippings to accumulate at one end and using slotted spoon, transfer pancetta to bowl with bread cubes. Add chestnuts and shallots to drippings in skillet; sauté until beginning to brown, about 6 minutes. Add thyme and rosemary; stir 1 minute. Transfer mixture to bowl with bread. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Cover; chill.

Preheat oven to 191°C. Generously butter 13x9x2-inch glass baking dish. Boil 3 cups broth in medium saucepan until reduced to 1 1/2 cups, 6 to 8 minutes. Whisk eggs in another large bowl. Mix in cheese. Gradually whisk in broth. Pour broth mixture over chestnut-bread mixture. Sprinkle with black pepper and stir well.
Transfer stuffing to prepared baking dish. Cover dish with foil and bake 25 minutes. Remove foil and bake uncovered until top is golden brown and slightly crisp around edges, about 20 minutes longer.

winter-soup-teleculinaria.name: Winter Soup
instructions: Praise the chopped onion in a pot with the olive oil. Add the meat and sausage and let it saute, always stirring until it is pink. Season with salt and pepper.

Add the cut kale in thin julian and the garlic cut into slices, stir well, cover and reduce the heat. Peel the pumpkin, cut it in cubes, add to the pan, cover and let cook for another 10 to 15 minutes, in mild heat.
Finally add the beans, cover with water and let cook for another 15 to 20 minutes. Serve the soup with the sausage cut into slices and the bread cut into strips.

1-wok-chicken-saag.name: 1-wok Chicken Saag
instructions: In a bowl, mix the Spices for Chicken with chicken pieces. Marinate for 20 minutes. Then, add oil to a wok and saute marinated chicken on medium heat until cooked through. Set aside in a bowl.
In a blender, blend together tomato, onion, and spinach. Once combined, add cumin seeds and water and grind into a fine paste.
In the wok used earlier, heat oil and add ginger garlic paste. Immediately add spinach paste (from blender) on medium heat and stir for 2 minutes.
Add curry spices and stir for 2 minutes. Boil on medium to low heat for 5 minutes, covering. Then, add chicken pieces, cover, and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the coconut milk and stir to combine.
Sprinkle coriander leaves and basil leaves in mixture and stir again for 1 minute. Remove from wok and let rest for 5 minutes.
Serve alongside warm rotis or white rice.
